prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime fantasy action illustration of exactly two masked female dancers/martial artists performing a dramatic synchronized pose in a moonlit palace courtyard. The first character, long flowing pastel pink hair, is elevated diagonally across the upper half of the image with one leg extended high toward the top-left corner, wearing a translucent white harem-dancer outfit with gauzy veils, gold chains, jeweled anklets, bare feet, pale fabric layers, and a delicate face veil; her expression is calm and confident with bright green eyes. The second character, black-and-white hair with red streaks in twin buns, crouches low in the foreground in a dynamic hand-to-ground fighting stance, wearing a dark red and black translucent harem outfit with gold jewelry, arm bands, ankle ornaments, bare feet, and a matching face veil; she has sharp green eyes and an intense gaze. Set them in an ornate domed palace at night under a bright full moon in the upper-right sky, with warm glowing windows, arched architecture, and a glossy reflective wet stone floor. Surround the characters with swirling ribbons of light, transparent silk trails, sparkling particles, rose-petal fragments, and a circular magical calligraphy spell effect on the right side containing black brush-like glyphs. Use a cinematic low-angle composition with strong diagonal motion, flowing hair and fabric, high-detail jewelry, dramatic rim lighting, soft moonlight, warm palace highlights, reflections on the ground, shallow depth of field, and an ultra-polished Japanese anime illustration style. The image should feel elegant, sensual, magical, and action-packed, with no modern objects, no watermark, and no readable English text.
